recommendations.title: D.E.B.S.
recommendations.overview: The star of a team of teenage crime fighters falls for the alluring villainess she must bring to justice.

recommendations.title: Security
recommendations.overview: An ex-special services veteran, down on his luck and desperate for work, takes a job as a security guard at a run-down mall in a rough area of town. On his first night on the job, he opens the door to a distraught and desperate young girl who has fle

recommendations.title: Friday After Next
recommendations.overview: Craig and his cousin Day-Day have finally moved out of their parents' houses and into their own crib, working nights at a local mall as security guards. When their house is robbed on Christmas Eve they set out to track down the culprit.

recommendations.title: The Great Train Robbery
recommendations.overview: After the train station clerk is assaulted and left bound and gagged, then the departing train and its passengers robbed, a posse goes in hot pursuit of the fleeing bandits.

recommendations.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
recommendations.overview: When a shopping mall is taken over by a gang of organized crooks, it's up to a mild-mannered security guard to save the day.

recommendations.title: Lights in the Dusk
recommendations.overview: Outcast by his co-workers and living alone, Koistinen is a security guard who works the night shift in a luxury shopping mall in Helsinki. But when icy blonde Mirja approaches him, the lonely Koistinen falls helplessly for her, unaware she is manipul

recommendations.title: Paranoid Park
recommendations.overview: A teenage skateboarder becomes suspected of being connected with a security guard who suffered a brutal death in a skate park called "Paranoid Park".

recommendations.title: Mist & the Maiden
recommendations.overview: A Sergeant of the Civil Guard and his subordinate are tasked to reopen the inquiry on the death of a young man in a Canary Island. The last person who saw him alive, a corporal of the Civil Guard, will help them to clarify the case.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Life of an American Fireman
